title: narcissus moschatus subsp. moleroi
intro: Narcissus moschatus subsp. moleroi, also known as the 'musk narcissus', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and promoting overall well-being. Narcissus moschatus subsp. moleroi can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, as well as being used in aromatherapy, to harness its medicinal properties and promote relaxation and calmness.
